title: enicosanthum congregatum
intro: Enicosanthum congregatum, also known as the yellow or yellowish flowered Enicosanthum, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. Enicosanthum congregatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in certain regions.
